name: github
label: GitHub
description: Search and query public GitHub repositories (no auth required)

actions.label: Search Repositories
actions.description: Search public GitHub repositories (no auth required)

actions.label: Get Repository
actions.description: Get details about a specific public repository
actions.code:
import httpx
r = httpx.get(f"https://api.github.com/repos/{params['owner']}/{params['repo']}",
              headers={'Accept': 'application/vnd.github+json'})
d = r.json()
result = {'ok': r.status_code == 200, 'name': d.get('full_name'),
          'stars': d.get('stargazers_count'), 'forks': d.get('forks_count'),
          'language': d.get('language'), 'description': d.get('description'),
          'url': d.get('html_url')}
